source_metadata.title: 2015/12/04 - ENV (Part 2)

Thursday 4 December 2025 | Environment Committee

2024/25 Annual review of the Ministry for the Environment (Continued)

Hearing of evidence:

Ministry for the Environment

James Palmer, Secretary for the Environment and Chief Executive
Anne Haira, Deputy Secretary, Partnerships, Investment and Enablement
